steps.title: Move from general to specific
steps.content: The first sentence broadly says Maya Singh worked at JPL, a major facility for robotic space exploration. The second sentence narrows that broad statement to one particular example of her JPL work: her systems engineering role on the Mars 2020 Perseverance rover team.

steps.title: Rule out other relationships
steps.content: A and D would signal contrast, but Singh's rover work is not opposed to her JPL work. C would signal the final item in a sequence, but the passage is not listing several roles. The transition should introduce a focused example of the previous general claim. The answer is B.
